title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team leveraged Claude Code to achieve rapid expansion from 1 billion to 19 billion dollars in 14 months. He identifies four strategies for AI-assisted growth: automating existing workflows, enabling previously sub-threshold work, building unique tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He also highlights a common ceiling where AI productivity becomes counterproductive for most users.
